description:
You are an infrastructure engineer who has just inherited some Terraform code living in /home/user/iac.  
Your first security-hardening step is to look for any rule that opens traffic to the entire Internet (CIDR “0.0.0.0/0”).  
Create a plain-text report called /home/user/scan_results.log that lists every line in any *.tf* file that contains the string **0.0.0.0/0**.

Strict requirements for the report:

1. One finding per line.  
2. Each line must follow *exactly* this format (no extra spaces or characters):  
   full_path_to_file:line_number:matching_line_contents  
   • “full_path_to_file” is the absolute path of the *.tf* file.  
   • “line_number” is the 1-based line number within that file.  
   • “matching_line_contents” is the full original line taken verbatim from the source file.  
3. Sort the lines alphabetically by the full file path before writing the file.  
4. Under no circumstances include any other text in /home/user/scan_results.log.  
5. Produce the report with a single terminal command (you may combine pipes, redirections, or logical operators, but the entire job must be launched in one command invocation).

When you are finished, the file /home/user/scan_results.log should exist and conform exactly to the format above so the automated tests can verify it.
truth:
Initial filesystem state (already present when the agent starts):

Directory: /home/user/iac

1. /home/user/iac/main.tf  
   Contents (15 lines, shown with line numbers for reference only—these numbers must **not** appear in the task description):

1  resource "aws_security_group" "web" {
2    name = "web"
3    ingress {
4      from_port   = 80
5      to_port     = 80
6      protocol    = "tcp"
7      cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
8    }
9  }

2. /home/user/iac/db.tf  
   Contents (15 lines):

1  resource "aws_security_group" "db" {
2    name = "db"
3    ingress {
4      from_port   = 5432
5      to_port     = 5432
6      protocol    = "tcp"
7      cidr_blocks = ["10.0.0.0/16"]
8    }
9    egress {
10     from_port   = 0
11     to_port     = 0
12     protocol    = "-1"
13     cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
14   }
15 }

3. /home/user/iac/variables.tf  
   Contents: *(empty file)*

Verification criteria (checked by automated tests after the agent finishes):

File /home/user/scan_results.log must exist and contain exactly two lines, in this order:

/home/user/iac/db.tf:13:    cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]  
/home/user/iac/main.tf:7:    cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]

No trailing spaces are allowed on either line, and the file must end with a single newline character.
name: task_000000_2bcd3935
